PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-22-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Codi Dada appeared by zoom for petitioner.

Mr. Dada stated that it is his understanding that the decedent had no heirs at law, that the decedent had no relatives and that he filed a supplement to the petition on March 27th.
There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated August 18, 2023 is admitted to probate. Jesus Francisco Alanzo is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 23, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is to be filed two weeks prior to the hearing. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-19-2024 Continued To Apr-22-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
